title: Classic Peripherals
description: Addon for CC: Tweaked that adds a bunch of peripherals and tweaks.
body:
Classic Peripherals is an addon for [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked/) that adds a bunch of peripherals and some tweaks.

Check out the documentation at [https://github.com/Ale32bit/ClassicPeripherals/wiki](https://github.com/Ale32bit/ClassicPeripherals/wiki)

# Features

## Tweaks

### Ender Modem Nerfing

In *vanilla* CC: Tweaked, Ender Modems are capable of transmitting and receiving messages from everywhere across all dimensions, with a virtually unlimited range.

This mod changes the behaviour of the peripheral by:
- Limiting the range to **2x normal wireless modem**'s range (unaffected by weather)
- Limiting the cross-dimensional messaging to work only if the block position is close by **8 blocks** (scaling is applied, ie. **1:8** for overworld and nether)

### Redstone Relay Enhancement

The network name of the Redstone Relay peripheral is now added to the `redstone` event.

## Radio network

Radio Towers can be built to assist long-range wireless communication.
Craft a Radio Tower Base, at least one Radio Tower Segment, and a Radio Tower Antenna and build the tower like in the image.

## NFC and RFID

The NFC Reader peripheral is capable of reading and writing data to the NFC Card and RFID Badge (write-only).

The RFID Scanner can read all badges within its range wirelessly without user interaction.

## Cryptographic Accelerator

Secure your communications with the Cryptographic Accelerator's implementation of Ed25519 and X25519, encrypt your data with AES or just hash your strings with SHA.

## Scanner

The Scanner peripheral can read printed paper. That's it. But it supports reading colors too!
